meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v14 Gareis
meta.description: Board-certified oral & maxillofacial surgeon. A portfolio of twenty-seven years of surgical work in the South Bay.

sections.name: Jorge Arce, D.D.S.
sections.lead: Board-certified, South Bay-based oral & maxillofacial surgeon — twenty-seven years on the complex extractions, reconstructions, and full-arch implant cases other surgeons refer out. Trained in Colombia, built in California.

quotes.q: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did.
When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make.
The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood.
I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner.

sections.label: About
paras: Jorge grew up in Colombia, the son of a family that valued precision and patience long before he ever held a scalpel. He trained there, moved to California to specialize, and never left. Over twenty-seven years he built a practice on a single, unglamorous principle: take the time the case actually needs.
In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay. Outside the operating room he is a father, a mentor to younger surgeons, and a quiet student of his craft.

facts.v: Dental implants · All-On-X · Reconstruction · Complex extractions · Pathology & TMJ · Second opinions
Dental Implants Center of South Bay, Est. 2007
Welcome — full surgical report returned, every time

sections.lead: For the patients who were told it couldn't be done — every case starts with an honest conversation. Ask for the free guide: What to expect from your first implant consultation.
